Seo.defaultTitle: GYD Marketing — JB Johor Bahru Marketing Agency
Seo.defaultDescription: GYD Marketing is a full-Malaysia marketing agency based in Iskandar Puteri, Johor Bahru. We handle Xiaohongshu, Facebook/Instagram ads, content creation, and offline campaigns for SMEs and brands across Malaysia.

home.title: GYD Marketing — JB Marketing Agency · Seen · Remembered · Loved
home.description: Johor Bahru (JB) full-service marketing agency. Xiaohongshu management, social media ads, content creative, offline events. We make Malaysian brands seen, remembered, and loved.

about.title: About | GYD Marketing — JB Johor Bahru Marketing Agency
about.description: We only do a little — but we do it well. GYD Marketing is a full-Malaysia marketing agency from Iskandar Puteri, Johor. We make brands seen, remembered, and loved.

services.title: Services | GYD Marketing — Xiaohongshu · Social Ads · Creative
services.description: JB marketing services in one stop: Xiaohongshu (RED) management, Facebook/Instagram ads, brand content creative, offline event planning. Johor Bahru SMEs' first-choice agency.

cases.title: Cases | GYD Marketing — JB Marketing Agency Work
cases.description: GYD Marketing client case studies: Xiaohongshu visibility, brand strategy, paid social results. See how Johor Bahru SMEs turn traffic into sales with us.

blog.title: Insights | GYD Marketing — Malaysia Marketing Blog
blog.description: GYD Marketing insights: Xiaohongshu operation tips, JB local promotion strategy, social platform trend analysis. First-hand practical views from a JB marketing agency.

faq.title: FAQ | GYD Marketing — Outsource Marketing FAQ
faq.description: How much does a JB marketing agency charge? How long does Xiaohongshu management take to show results? GYD Marketing answers the questions clients ask most.

contact.title: Contact | GYD Marketing — Johor Bahru Marketing Agency
contact.description: Want to talk marketing with GYD? WhatsApp +6019-6721100 or email hq@gydmarketing.co. Our JB office: Iskandar Puteri, Johor, Malaysia.

team.title: Team | GYD Marketing — JB Marketing Agency Team
team.description: Meet the GYD Marketing team. A group of marketers in Johor Bahru who believe 'a little is enough' — hand us your brand, focus on what you do best.
